# GitHub Upload Checklist

Use this checklist to ensure everything is ready for uploading ACCIL to GitHub.

## 📋 Pre-upload Checks

### Core Files
- [x] `main.go` - Entry point
- [x] `go.mod` - Go module file
- [x] `go.sum` - Dependencies lock file (generated by `go mod tidy`)
- [x] `.gitignore` - Git ignore rules

### Documentation
- [x] `README.md` - English documentation
- [x] `README_zh.md` - Chinese documentation
- [x] `CONTRIBUTING.md` - Contribution guidelines (bilingual)
- [x] `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` - Code of conduct (bilingual)
- [x] `SECURITY.md` - Security policy (bilingual)
- [x] `CHANGELOG.md` - Version history
- [x] `QUICKSTART.md` - Quick start guide
- [x] `LICENSE` - MIT License

### Installation Scripts
- [x] `install.sh` - Linux/macOS installation script
- [x] `install.bat` - Windows batch installation script
- [x] `install.ps1` - Windows PowerShell installation script

### Build & CI/CD
- [x] `Makefile` - Build automation
- [x] `.github/workflows/ci.yml` - Continuous Integration
- [x] `.github/workflows/release.yml` - Automated releases

### Templates
- [x] `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md` - Bug report template
- [x] `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md` - Feature request template
- [x] `.github/pull_request_template.md` - PR template
- [x] `.github/CODEOWNERS` - Code ownership

### Source Code Structure
- [x] `cmd/root.go` - Main command logic
- [x] `internal/ai/` - AI client
- [x] `internal/config/` - Configuration management
- [x] `internal/context/` - Context management
- [x] `internal/memory/` - Memory system
- [x] `internal/session/` - Session handling
- [x] `internal/tools/` - Tool implementations
- [x] `internal/tui/` - Terminal UI
- [x] `internal/quest/` - Quest mode
- [x] `internal/agent/` - Sub-agents
- [x] `internal/review/` - Code review

## 🔍 Final Verification

### Before First Commit
1. **Test compilation**:
   ```bash
   go build -o accil .
   ./accil version
   ```

2. **Run tests** (if any):
   ```bash
   go test ./...
   ```

3. **Check code formatting**:
   ```bash
   gofmt -l .
   ```

4. **Verify all imports**:
   ```bash
   go mod tidy
   go mod verify
   ```

### Git Setup
1. **Initialize repository**:
   ```bash
   git init
   git add .
   ```

2. **Create initial commit**:
   ```bash
   git commit -m "feat: initial release of ACCIL"
   ```

3. **Add remote repository**:
   ```bash
   git remote add origin https://github.com/accil/accil.git
   ```

4. **Push to GitHub**:
   ```bash
   git push -u origin main
   ```

### Post-upload Verification
- [ ] Repository is public and accessible
- [ ] README renders correctly on GitHub
- [ ] All links in documentation work
- [ ] Installation scripts are downloadable
- [ ] CI workflow triggers on push
- [ ] Release workflow is configured

## 🚀 Release Process

When ready to release:

1. **Update version**:
   ```bash
   git tag v0.1.0
   git push origin v0.1.0
   ```

2. **GitHub Actions will automatically**:
   - Run tests
   - Build binaries for all platforms
   - Create a GitHub release with assets

3. **Verify release**:
   - Check that all binaries are attached
   - Test installation from release
   - Confirm release notes are accurate

---

**Ready to share ACCIL with the world! 🌟**
